## Where Revenue Grows, Fraudsters Follow

![shapes](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20539%20350'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

As internet & software businesses expand, so do the threats posed by fraudsters. Rapid evolution of fraud tactics demands AI-driven solutions to safeguard every transaction.

13%

Rise in payment fraud attack rate across digital goods & services in 2024 vs. 2023*

*Source: FIBR

80%

Of consumers would stop shopping on a site where they’d been a victim of ATO*

*Source: Sift Q3 2024 Index Report

## Real-Time Defense for Real-Time Delivery

Get robust fraud protection tailored to the needs of your industry and your specific business. Our AI-powered insights help teams apply friction only when necessary, reducing customer insults and ensuring unmatched security that doesn’t sacrifice speed.  
  
**Building an internal risk engine?** The Sift Score API adds critical external context to internally-built risk models. Detect global & industry threats with real-time risk scores powered by 1T annual consortium events. Build the way you want, without sacrificing access to the powerful tools in the Sift Console. **Learn more**.

SIFT FOR INTERNET & SOFTWARE | ONE-PAGER

### Drive Growth Through Enhanced Customer Experiences

Secure more transactions with pinpoint accuracy and dynamic friction, retaining loyal customers in real time.

### Refocus Fraud Operations on Growth

Sift enables businesses to refocus resources on growth by automating fraud decisioning to guard trusted user accounts. With Sift, businesses can win disputes and prevent fraudulent transactions without compromising the user experience or limiting opportunities to drive revenue.

![Quotation mark](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Sift couldn’t be easier to use, and the automation has helped me immensely as a team of one.

Susannah Page-Katz

Trust and Safety Manager at Skillshare

![skillshare](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![DigitalGoods\_Solutions\_Teaser](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201024%20840'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

## Fight More Fraud Faster & Grow on Your Terms

Own the risk-reward equation with Sift’s scalable, AI-powered decisioning platform and on-demand expertise. Our immense data consortium and deep, user-level insights allow digital providers to eliminate fraud vulnerabilities while confidently investing in growth.

3.6%

Payment fraud attack rate

Internet & software providers face a 3.6% payment fraud attack rate, but Sift’s AI-driven protection helps reduce fraudulent transactions while enhancing customer trust.

0.1%

Overall account takeover rate

Protect trusted transactions with Sift’s AI-powered decisioning, which maintains an impressive 0.1% account takeover rate.

0.9%

Manual review rate

Keep manual reviews to a minimum with insights tailored specifically to internet & software risk, so you can quickly automate and scale fraud detection.

## Accelerating Secure Growth with AI-fueled Data and Decisioning

Harness the power of AI and diversified data to outpace rapidly changing fraud. Sift provides real-time fraud insights that make it easy for leading brands to grow fearlessly.
